programme.title: Lessons From the Bible
programme.desc: Únase al pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia y todos los personajes mientras aprenden sobre la Biblia y cómo se aplica a la vida diaria. ¡Los juegos, las canciones y algunos títeres tontos inspirarán a los niños a seguir y adentrarse en la Palabra de Dios!

programme.title: Superlibro
programme.desc: Luis dice que nunca perdonará a Anita cuando ella accidentalmente rocía agua a Tuercas y causa que haga un cortocircuito. Superlibro los lleva a conocer a Jacob y Esaú, hermanos gemelos que no se llevan bien.

programme.title: Torchlighters

programme.desc: Transforme la atmósfera de lo que sea que esté enfrentando a través del poder de la adoración con Josh Morales.

programme.title: Fe y Fuego
programme.desc: Dios le dijo a Noe que construya un arca, el obedeció por fe; el arca se convirtió en la protección de Dios para Él y su familia; la biblia dice en 1 Juan 5:4 "La victoria que vence al mundo es nuestra fe".

programme.title: Sid Roth - ¡Es Sobrenatural!
programme.desc: Jon y Jolene Hamill han recibido una alarmante alerta profética del trono de Dios; dicen que no nos estamos acercando al fin de los tiempos, sino que estamos en él, y que el tiempo avanza.

programme.title: A Toda Luz
programme.desc: ¿Te hace falta ánimo o quieres crecer en tu fe junto a otros? A Toda Luz es un programa lleno de vida, con conversaciones reales, risas, y verdades que inspiran. Con voces dinámicas y temas relevantes, te anima, te conecta y te acerca más a Dios.

programme.title: Dr. Robert Jeffries - Camino a la Victoria
programme.desc: Pastor de la Primera Iglesia Bautista de Dallas, Texas, y autor, el Dr. Robert Jeffress, ofrece a los espectadores y feligreses una colección de aplicaciones prácticas e inspiradoras derivadas de las Sagradas Escrituras para la sociedad actual.

programme.title: Lo sobrenatural ahora
programme.desc: El Apóstol Guillermo Maldonado demuestra el extraordinario poder de Dios y los milagros imposibles.

programme.desc: Jon y Jolene Hamill han recibido una alarmante alerta profética del trono de Dios; dicen que no nos estamos acercando al fin de los tiempos, sino que estamos en él, y que el tiempo avanza.

programme.title: En contacto con Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Pastor Dr. Charles Stanley usa sus diversos programas y ministerio para difundir el Evangelio a la población del mundo, y utiliza sus predicaciones para convencer a los seguidores del cristianismo a mantener una relación más estrecha con Jesucristo.

programme.title: Christian Worship Hour
programme.desc: La Hora de Adoración Cristiana con el Dr. Harold E. Salem proclama la Palabra de Dios con sencillez y humildad en toda su verdad y pureza, con especial preocupación y compasión por los perdidos y con esperanza y ánimo por todos los creyentes.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Encuentre respuestas en la Palabra de Dios y aprenda a vivir cada día con un propósito y significado mientras Jentezen Franklin presenta la verdad clara y simple que lo inspirará a ser lo mejor posible.

programme.title: Descubriendo al Jesús Judío
programme.desc: El Rabino Schneider, un judío creyente en Jesús, enseña pasionalmente las verdades sinérgicas entre la Biblia Hebrea (el Viejo Testamento) y el Nuevo Testamento, que son relevantes y aplicables a la vida real para los televidentes.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni, un programa de entrevistas de media hora animado y, a veces, impredecible, aborda una amplia gama de temas relevantes, temas controvertidos y temas de actualidad con franqueza e ingenio. Combinando segmentos vibrantes con invitados notables.

programme.title: Building for the Future Ep.1
programme.desc: Through major achievements in ecology, infrastructure, technology, and public welfare, this series reveals China's most transformative projects and how they benefit the present, while shaping generations to come.

programme.title: The Rewakening of the Grassland
programme.desc: In Qinghai's Nianbaoyuze area, Tibetan herder volunteers, government officials and experts join forces in the monumental task of protecting the plateau's ecosystems, spotlighting the community-based conservation efforts underway in this fragile highland environment.

programme.title: The Call of the Plateau
programme.desc: In Qinghai's Nianbaoyuze mountain range, 16 local herders—15 of them women—work tirelessly to protect endangered black-necked cranes and the wetlands they call home, even as the dangers of climate change threaten to undo their efforts.

programme.title: Memory of the World: When China Echoes Ep.4
programme.desc: Drawing on Chinese archives inscribed in UNESCO's Memory of the World—including oracle bones and Qing examination result lists—this series uses small artifacts to tell grand stories, preserving China's heritage for China, and for all humanity.

programme.title: Memory of the World: When China Echoes Ep.5
programme.desc: Drawing on Chinese archives inscribed in UNESCO's Memory of the World—including oracle bones and Qing examination result lists—this series uses small artifacts to tell grand stories, preserving China's heritage for China, and for all humanity.

programme.title: Dr. Bliss and Shaowu—A Century of China–U.S. Friendship
programme.desc: A look at the life of American doctor Edward Bliss in the early 20th century—celebrating more than a century of cross-border friendship, enduring bonds, and Sino-American exchange.

programme.title: Opening the Seal of Deep Time Ep.1
programme.desc: This documentary follows fossil restoration experts as they brush away the dust of time, uncovering the lost world of Guizhou's ancient dragons and ichthyosaurs—creatures that ruled the seas hundreds of millions of years ago.

programme.title: Opening the Seal of Deep Time Ep.2
programme.desc: This documentary follows fossil restoration experts as they brush away the dust of time, uncovering the lost world of Guizhou's ancient dragons and ichthyosaurs—creatures that ruled the seas hundreds of millions of years ago.

programme.title: Building for the Future Ep.2
programme.desc: Through major achievements in ecology, infrastructure, technology, and public welfare, this series reveals China's most transformative projects and how they benefit the present, while shaping generations to come.

programme.title: Building for the Future Ep.3
programme.desc: Through major achievements in ecology, infrastructure, technology, and public welfare, this series reveals China's most transformative projects and how they benefit the present, while shaping generations to come.

programme.title: Living by Chagan Lake Ep.1
programme.desc: This documentary brings us to Chagan Lake, where ecological protection, the intangible cultural heritage of winter fishing, and local livelihoods paint a striking portrait of harmony between humans and nature.

programme.title: Living by Chagan Lake Ep.2
programme.desc: This documentary brings us to Chagan Lake, where ecological protection, the intangible cultural heritage of winter fishing, and local livelihoods paint a striking portrait of harmony between humans and nature.

programme.title: Bird's-eye China : Shanghai
programme.desc: Balancing delicately on an alluvial plain and the Yangtze estuary of China’s east coast, much of Shanghai-literally meaning “on the sea”-sits at an average sea-level elevation of about 4 meters. Bisecting the city is the Huangpu River, dividing it into Puxi (west bank) and Pudong (east bank), where you’ll find its famous international airport. Join us as on an aerial cruise as we journey upstream towards one of the world’s most recognizable skylines.

programme.title: Guild Halls of the Southeast Asian Nations Ep.1
programme.desc: Through family accounts, this series traces Chinese immigration and entrepreneurship in Southeast Asia, preserving stories of perseverance, cultural roots, and the lasting ties with their ancestral hometowns.

programme.title: Building for the Future Ep.2
programme.desc: Through major achievements in ecology, infrastructure, technology, and public welfare, this series reveals China's most transformative projects and how they benefit the present, while shaping generations to come.

programme.title: Building for the Future Ep.3
programme.desc: Through major achievements in ecology, infrastructure, technology, and public welfare, this series reveals China's most transformative projects and how they benefit the present, while shaping generations to come.

programme.title: Living by Chagan Lake Ep.1
programme.desc: This documentary brings us to Chagan Lake, where ecological protection, the intangible cultural heritage of winter fishing, and local livelihoods paint a striking portrait of harmony between humans and nature.

programme.title: Last Devils
programme.desc: Tasmanian Devils are the world's largest carnivorous marsupials and they are only found in Tasmania. Through hundreds of hours of filming in the wild, we reveal how fights over food are a carefully choreographed ritual, we witness the seemingly brutal mating process, see tiny young developing inside their mother's pouch, and visit wild devil pups play-fighting and hunting as they prepare for life in the outside world.

programme.title: Anaconda - The Silent Killer
programme.desc: Few snakes are feared more and understood less than the anaconda. The film shows the journey into remote and uncharted parts of the Amazon rainforest to find the truth behind the mythical beast. Lush green forests abound with colorful toucans, noisy howler monkeys, strange tapirs, and vibrant Amazon Indian tribes. But hiding in the dense vegetation and murky swamps is also the biggest and most powerful snake in the world: the anaconda.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The most aggressive of ocean predators, the bull shark, is notorious for leaving the safety of the deep blue ocean, venturing far up the murky rivers of Africa's coast in search of prey. But lurking in these shadowy places is Africa's deadliest killer - the Nile crocodile. Reports of clashes between the two are many but marine researchers Ryan Johnson and Tess Hempson, are determined to find out the truth.

programme.title: Strange Creatures of the Batangas Sea
programme.desc: Hidden in the magical underwater world of one of the most biodiverse marine areas on the planet exists a community of spectacular animals more peculiar than we can imagine.

programme.title: Giant Sea Serpent: Meet the Myth
programme.desc: Its 10-meter length and silver ribbon shape inspired the myth of the sea serpent. Off the French Riviera, buoys set 2,000 meters deep attract pelagic species, including the Giant Oarfish—“King of Herrings”—drifting vertically, alone or in pairs. With expert guidance and passionate collaborators, a scientific expedition unveils the biology of this mysterious ambassador of the abyss.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Lions
programme.desc: Meet the one animal that rules supreme as the undisputed King of the Jungle - the lion, and some surprising ways lions can work together.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Cheetahs & Leopards
programme.desc: See how even the strongest predators, such as cheetahs and leopards, can face danger at every turn.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions attempt to dig a stubborn warthog out of his hole, while an influx of volunteers have arrived and Nathan instructs them with an induction talk on how to treat, walk and cope with lions. Laili notches up another triumph as she catches an African hare.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We get a first peek at the adorable additions in the denning enclosure. Lewa and Laili take their hunting skills to a new level and tackle a kudu, and we find out what Rae’s doing with hyena poo! Also, Kwali takes a nasty bite to the cheek. Can she hang onto her prize?

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Penya and Paza encounter a python; the adorable cubs go on their first bush outing; Lewa and Laili keep the zebra on their toes. Meanwhile, the research team have more experiments for the Ngamo lions.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Battles for survival play out every day in the animal kingdom. For the majority of animals, each battle is an uncertainty. But for a fortunate few, the odds are tilted much more in their favor.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: They take their time because they know time is on their side. When the strike happens, it happens in a violent flurry. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we will meet three of the world’s best lurkers.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: They are purr-fect predators. They move with slow purpose. But attack in violent bursts. They are cats, big cats to be precise. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we will meet three of the most magnificent.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Some animals simply take your breath away. Majestic in so many ways, they move with grace and attack with style. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we meet three majestic animals.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: The marine world is home to an eclectic mix of creatures each with their own unique survival skills, voracious hunting tactics and fascinating adaptations. We begin with the barracuda.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: On the trail of his top ten, Nigel meets worshippers and vipers at Penang's famous Snake Temple and meets a new squeeze, a snappy reticulated python over 4 metres long! In hilltop forests there's a red-headed krait and the David Bowie spider. He joins fishermen to net some superb sea snakes. But which of Malaysia's 40 venomous snakes will make the top spot?

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Australia's renowned deadly serpents include the inland taipan, the most toxic serpent in the world, and the enormous king brown, which can deliver more venom in a single bite than any other snake. As Nigel counts down his top ten, he's helped by Steve Irwin's son Robert, whose favourite billabong is a prime spot for a snake on Nigel's list.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Every year over a million people are bitten by snakes, resulting in some 46,000 deaths - Nigel tracks down the ten deadliest. He meets an enormous king cobra and the infamous Russell's viper, a snake responsible for more deaths than any other. With the help of the Irula, a tribe of snake hunters, he faces off with kraits, vipers and cobras.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Europe is home to some 50 species of snakes; around 19 of them are venomous. Nigel crosses the continent in search of the most dangerous. On the Greek island of Milos there's an endangered viper that ambushes birds, while in Spain there are Montpellier snakes, asp vipers, colourful lizards and egg-laden toads. Amid ancient Turkish ruins he uncovers a massive Ottoman viper, a snake once used as a weapon of war.

programme.title: Great White Shark - Beyond the Cage of Fear
programme.desc: Most people believe that the Great White Shark is a mindless eating machine. But what if we are wrong? In Beyond the Cage of Fear, a crew of scientists forms a relationship with a 2,000 pound Great White Shark named Bruce. They see through his eyes, swim with him, touch him and, in the end, they even attempt an experiment that most people would find absolutely crazy: introduce a Great White Shark to a real-life mermaid.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D’Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Safe-guarded by isolation, the island is a jewel of the Indian Ocean. Teaming with wildlife, the sand cay and neighbouring coral atoll are home to rare giant tortoises, hawksbill turtles, and shearwaters. In the depths, dolphins, greater hammerhead and tiger sharks roam. Green turtles nest on the pristine beaches, reef sharks bear live pups in the shallow lagoon, whales come to the deep channel, and mantas feed over coral reefs. Now designated as a wildlife reserve this natural treasure trove has the recognition it so rightly deserves.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: The Great White Sharks of Guadalupe
programme.desc: The great white shark has a fearsome reputation and diving with them is definitely a risky business. But Frederic wants to show a different side of the infamous great white: Mexican zoologist Mauricio Hoyos believes that their aggression is triggered by excessive disturbance in the water. He wants to get to the bottom of the sharks' secretive migrations and their interactions with other species, including humans.

programme.title: Sharks (3DE) - (IMAX film)
programme.desc: Presented by Jean-Michel Cousteau, Sharks 3D is a breathtaking new three-dimensional film experience that offers audiences an astonishing up-close encounter with the Lions and Tigers of the Ocean.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel explores almost every type of environment in China, climbing steep forested slopes and even wading into a sea cave to track down his top ten. But which is number one?

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Costa Rica has two venomous snakes for every hectare of land, including some of the world's most feared tropical snakes. Which of these kings of the jungle will make it to the top of Nigel's list?

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The USA is the land of the rattlesnake – there are over 30 species of rattler found here. But what's the deadliest serpent in the country?

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: With almost 2000 snakebites causing 250 deaths every year, South Africa is a hotspot for deadly snakes, with some of the most feared serpents in the world. But what's the most deadly?

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show. Delve deep into the African waters and discover a new side of these prehistoric predators of the sea, while reconsidering the Hollywood portrayal which has done much to damage the reputation of these gentle creatures.

programme.title: Search for the Great Sharks
programme.desc: From the coast of California to the remote reaches of South and Western Australia, this film pursues blue sharks, whale sharks, and the notorious great white to allow viewers an up-close experience.

programme.title: Great White Shark - Beyond the Cage of Fear
programme.desc: Most people believe that the Great White Shark is a mindless eating machine. But what if we are wrong? In Beyond the Cage of Fear, a crew of scientists forms a relationship with a 2,000 pound Great White Shark named Bruce. They see through his eyes, swim with him, touch him and, in the end, they even attempt an experiment that most people would find absolutely crazy: introduce a Great White Shark to a real-life mermaid.

programme.title: Great White Shark - Beyond the Cage of Fear
programme.desc: Most people believe that the Great White Shark is a mindless eating machine. But what if we are wrong? In Beyond the Cage of Fear, a crew of scientists forms a relationship with a 2,000 pound Great White Shark named Bruce. They see through his eyes, swim with him, touch him and, in the end, they even attempt an experiment that most people would find absolutely crazy: introduce a Great White Shark to a real-life mermaid.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Shark Paradise of Polynesia
programme.desc: French Polynesia's great hammerhead sharks are extraordinarily shy animals and still pose many questions, not least where they go during their annual migration. Freediver Frederic Buyle and cameraman Christian Petron team up with scientist Dr. Johan Mourir to investigate these bizarre predators.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Shark Paradise of Polynesia
programme.desc: French Polynesia's great hammerhead sharks are extraordinarily shy animals and still pose many questions, not least where they go during their annual migration. Freediver Frederic Buyle and cameraman Christian Petron team up with scientist Dr. Johan Mourir to investigate these bizarre predators.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show. Delve deep into the African waters and discover a new side of these prehistoric predators of the sea, while reconsidering the Hollywood portrayal which has done much to damage the reputation of these gentle creatures.

programme.title: Giants of Fortune - The Whale Sharks of Oslob
programme.desc: In the little Filipino village of Oslob on the Cebu Island, people suffer from typhoons and overfishing. Until the world's biggest fish and the Internet change everything.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D’Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Safe-guarded by isolation, the island is a jewel of the Indian Ocean. Teaming with wildlife, the sand cay and neighbouring coral atoll are home to rare giant tortoises, hawksbill turtles, and shearwaters. In the depths, dolphins, greater hammerhead and tiger sharks roam. Green turtles nest on the pristine beaches, reef sharks bear live pups in the shallow lagoon, whales come to the deep channel, and mantas feed over coral reefs. Now designated as a wildlife reserve this natural treasure trove has the recognition it so rightly deserves.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Cheetahs & Leopards
programme.desc: See how even the strongest predators, such as cheetahs and leopards, can face danger at every turn.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Hyenas
programme.desc: Discover much more than meets the eye about hyenas, bold and curious animals that show intellect unlike any other animal on the Savanna.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions are on the hunt for giraffe. Meanwhile, researcher Rae accompanies the lions as they encounter nervy hartebeest. The game capture unit are tasked with supplying more zebra for the Ngama release site. And don’t miss the action as hungry Kwali zones in on an unsuspecting zebra. But can she hold on?

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Phyre has to be darted to keep the balance in the pride healthy, while Pazza shows off her highly possessive nature with an unsuspecting tortoise. And Milo demonstrates why he wears the pants around here.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We follow the as they walk and stalk. Meat preparation gets weird for some as our volunteers make dinner time more interesting. A brave zebra stallion takes the fight to the ever confident lions. A historical moment is notched up for Wakanaka as she proves her predatory prowess.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Not all predators sit on top of the food chain. However, all predators need to eat. In the wild, survival often requires one to use the skills nature has provided to create opportunities for success.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: It is easy to overlook the tiny in stature, but sometimes the smallest should be the most feared. On this episode of Killer Instinct, three big little assassins prove that size has nothing to do with survival.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: It is easy to overlook the tiny in stature, but sometimes the smallest should be the most feared. On this episode of Killer Instinct, three big little assassins prove that size has nothing to do with survival.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Apex predators sit comfortably atop the food chain. Cunning as they are large, they rule over their environments. Large and in-charge, their speed and bulk deliver a knockout blow.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Venom, a lethal weapon brandished by hundreds of animals of all shapes and sizes, over land and sea. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we’ll meet three creatures whose venomous sting strikes fear in the hearts of people around the globe.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Nature’s heavyweight battles test the most powerful animals’ killer instincts and their will to live. On this episode, we explore what happens when the world’s most deadly apex predators go head to head for survival!

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel comes face-to-face with the Philippine cobra, the most lethally venomous cobra on the planet. And in deep, dark caves on Palawan Island, the presenter searches for giant reticulated pythons sheltering from the heat of the day.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Infra-red cameras in the dead of night reveals a forest pit-viper sense and strike a target just fractionally warmer than its surroundings. Then there's the mussurana - a snake that not only eats other snakes but is immune to their venom.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: In the tunnels of a leafcutter ant nest, we uncover a Central American coral snake sharing the burrow. Nigel meets a rattlesnake without a rattle, and a young Mexican cantil uses its white tail tip to attract prey close for a deadly strike.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Snakes are highly-adapted to survive in the scorching deserts of Arabia, and Nigel's skills are tested to find his top ten. Will the saw-scaled viper's venom and lightning reflexes be a match for the backwards strike of the puff adder?

programme.title: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story
Strange Creatures of the Batangas Sea
programme.desc: Hidden in the magical underwater world of one of the most biodiverse marine areas on the planet exists a community of spectacular animals more peculiar than we can imagine.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: It is easy to overlook the tiny in stature, but sometimes the smallest should be the most feared. On this episode of Killer Instinct, three big little assassins prove that size has nothing to do with survival.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Nature’s heavyweight battles test the most powerful animals’ killer instincts and their will to live. On this episode, we explore what happens when the world’s most deadly apex predators go head to head for survival!

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Few things in nature conjure such instant fear as a set of killer teeth rising out of gaping jaws. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we’ll examine a number of sharp toothed animals worthy of a much closer look.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Lions
programme.desc: Meet the one animal that rules supreme as the undisputed King of the Jungle - the lion, and some surprising ways lions can work together.

programme.title: Great Species of Africa - Hyenas
programme.desc: Discover much more than meets the eye about hyenas, bold and curious animals that show intellect unlike any other animal on the Savanna.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Shark Paradise of Polynesia
programme.desc: French Polynesia's great hammerhead sharks are extraordinarily shy animals and still pose many questions, not least where they go during their annual migration. Freediver Frederic Buyle and cameraman Christian Petron team up with scientist Dr. Johan Mourir to investigate these bizarre predators.

programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show. Delve deep into the African waters and discover a new side of these prehistoric predators of the sea, while reconsidering the Hollywood portrayal which has done much to damage the reputation of these gentle creatures.

programme.title: Giants of Fortune - The Whale Sharks of Oslob
programme.desc: In the little Filipino village of Oslob on the Cebu Island, people suffer from typhoons and overfishing. Until the world's biggest fish and the Internet change everything.

programme.title: Sharks (3DE) - (IMAX film)
programme.desc: Presented by Jean-Michel Cousteau, Sharks 3D is a breathtaking new three-dimensional film experience that offers audiences an astonishing up-close encounter with the Lions and Tigers of the Ocean.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Shark Paradise of Polynesia
programme.desc: French Polynesia's great hammerhead sharks are extraordinarily shy animals and still pose many questions, not least where they go during their annual migration. Freediver Frederic Buyle and cameraman Christian Petron team up with scientist Dr. Johan Mourir to investigate these bizarre predators.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: Few things in nature conjure such instant fear as a set of killer teeth rising out of gaping jaws. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we’ll examine a number of sharp toothed animals worthy of a much closer look.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: You don’t have to be a heavyweight in the animal kingdom to possess killer instincts, but it sure does help. On this episode of Killer Instincts, we’ll meet three scale-tipping heavyweights.

programme.title: Une Mère Diabolique
programme.desc: Lorsque Allison, 14 ans, perd son père dans un accident d'avion, trois ans après la mort de sa mère adoptive, elle est dévastée. Lors des funérailles, elle est choquée de rencontrer sa mère biologique, Jessica. Elle et sa demi-sœur Sydni seront encore plus choquées de découvrir que Jessica a un plan infâme pour contrôler les 40 millions de dollars dont Allison doit hériter.

programme.title: Cop Car
programme.desc: Un shérif d'une petite ville part à la recherche des deux enfants qui ont emmené sa voiture en balade.

programme.title: Complicité fatale
programme.desc: Sara pensait avoir enfin trouvé le bonheur lorsqu'elle s'est échappée d'une vie de pauvreté et d'abus pour épouser Jim Bratchett. Le bonheur de Sara est de courte durée lorsqu'elle découvre que Jim a une fille invalide. Prisonnière à plein temps, Sara envisage de quitter Jim jusqu'à ce qu'elle découvre une police d'assurance-vie d'un million de dollars.

programme.title: Puzzle
programme.desc: Agnès, une mère de famille rangée vivant en banlieue, se découvre une passion pour les puzzles. Ce nouvel univers fait prendre à sa vie un tournant qu'elle n'aurait jamais imaginé.

programme.title: Country Crunch
programme.desc: Un mécanicien d'une petite ville rencontre une chanteuse de country en herbe. S'agit-il d'un coup de foudre pour ce couple de jeunes adultes ou simplement d'une attirance mutuelle dans une comédie musicale sans préavis ?

programme.title: L'Édition de l'Amour
programme.desc: La rédactrice beauté d’un magazine féminin convainc un photographe prometteur de prétendre être son petit ami lorsque son ex se fiance avec une autre. Ensemble, ils devront collaborer pour redorer la réputation déclinante du magazine.

programme.title: Suspicion
programme.desc: Catherine rencontre Nick, un veuf, qu'elle épouse et avec qui elle emménage. Des choses étranges commencent à lui arriver dans son appartement. Est-elle en train de l'imaginer ou...

programme.title: Mes Deux amours
programme.desc: Hadrien se lance à la recherche de la femme qu'il aime, Barbara, qui a disparu sans lui donner de nouvelles. Personne ne veut entendre ses angoisses sauf un autre homme, qui affirme à Hadrien que la femme de sa vie est la sienne... La rencontre entre les deux amants de Barbara a lieu à l'endroit où elle a été aperçue pour la dernière fois : la bergerie dont elle a hérité de sa mère. Hadrien Darcourt est arrivé en 4x4, Emmanuel Devailly, en stop. Hadrien est encore en costume, Emmanuel est déjà en tenue de campagne. Hadrien a fait appel à la gendarmerie, Emmanuel à son instinct. Bref, tout les oppose, mais ils aiment tous deux Barbara Cantarella, 45 ans, grand reporter

programme.title: Holiday Heritage
programme.desc: Ella, avec l'aide de son ex-petit ami, Griffin, encourage sa famille à célébrer Noël et Kwanzaa pour guérir leurs blessures passées.

programme.title: Une mariée en cavale
programme.desc: Juste avant son mariage, Lisa plaque son fiancé infidèle, Max, et prend le bus direction l'aéroport pour quitter l'Afrique. Le destin veut que son ancien amoureux, Vic, venu ici elle cinq ans plus tôt, voyage dans ce même bus. Il convoie incognito le Nuage d'Anamanga, un diamant légendaire. Mais le car est attaqué et la pierre tant convoitée est dérobée. Menottés l'un à l'autre, Lisa et Vic prennent la fuite dans la jungle...

programme.title: Un Noël de Roman
programme.desc: La romancière cynique Dru Cassadine, connue pour ses histoires d'amour, cherche désespérément à percer après une série d'échecs. Poussée par des critiques brutales et la menace de son éditeur de la laisser tomber, elle n'a que quelques semaines pour écrire un best-seller.

programme.title: Never Let Go
programme.desc: Une mère célibataire en vacances fait appel à la justice pour récupérer son enfant enlevé.

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: À Paris au XVIIe siècle, un élégant bretteur nommé D'Artagnan se retrouve opposé aux puissantes forces qui prennent le contrôle de la France. Il part venger le meurtre de ses parents et découvre un pays déchiré par le chaos et les troubles civils. Son cœur ne s’adoucit que pour Francesca, une fougueuse paysanne qui conquiert D'Artagnan au premier regard.

programme.title: Un hiver à Central Park
programme.desc: L'histoire d'une femme confrontée à la mort de sa fille en bas âge, tout en essayant de préserver son mariage et sa relation avec son beau-fils.

programme.title: Un hiver à Central Park
programme.desc: L'histoire d'une femme confrontée à la mort de sa fille en bas âge, tout en essayant de préserver son mariage et sa relation avec son beau-fils.

programme.title: Puzzle
programme.desc: Agnès, une mère de famille rangée vivant en banlieue, se découvre une passion pour les puzzles. Ce nouvel univers fait prendre à sa vie un tournant qu'elle n'aurait jamais imaginé.

programme.title: Puzzle
programme.desc: Agnès, une mère de famille rangée vivant en banlieue, se découvre une passion pour les puzzles. Ce nouvel univers fait prendre à sa vie un tournant qu'elle n'aurait jamais imaginé.

programme.title: Border Run
programme.desc: Une journaliste américaine recherche son frère disparu sur fond de violence et de trafic d'êtres humains à la frontière américano-mexicaine.

programme.title: La dernière chance
programme.desc: Un agent du FBI doit négocier avec une femme qui prend un hôpital en otage afin de mettre la main sur un médicament expérimental.

programme.title: Becky
programme.desc: Une femme belle, dérangée et dangereuse devient obsédée par un homme marié récemment installé dans le quartier et sème le chaos dans tous les aspects de la vie du couple.

programme.title: La messagère
programme.desc: Après avoir frôlé la mort, Ellie Daly est terrifiée de réaliser qu'elle est capable de voir et de parler avec les morts. De retour chez elle, elle est abordée par le fantôme furieux d'une femme morte, qui accuse le mystérieux et séduisant nouveau voisin d'Ellie de son propre meurtre brutal.

programme.title: Amour et préméditation
programme.desc: Une ancienne avocate de la défense, qui travaille maintenant comme avocate spécialisée dans les divorces, est invitée à représenter le mari de sa meilleure amie, qui a été accusé de son meurtre.

programme.title: Hollywood Sunrise
programme.desc: Les acteurs d'Hollywood dissèquent leur vie personnelle lorsque tout semble s'entrechoquer.

programme.title: Meurtres au féminin
programme.desc: Eva est une jeune femme flic chargée des affaires de vols au sein de la ville de Barcelone. Un jour, elle est appelée en urgence pour rejoindre l’unité qui traque une tueuse en série ayant pour cible les vieilles femmes. Alors qu’un vent de panique s’abat sur la ville, la jeune femme pourtant novice dans ce genre d’affaires, va tenter de mettre la main sur la meurtrière… C’est sans ompter la bataille personnelle qu’elle va devoir mener de front contre son inspecteur en chef, qui passe son temps à lui fermer la porte au nez et lui compliquer la tâche au sein de l’unité.

programme.title: Horse camp
programme.desc: Une jeune fille se rend dans un centre équestre et apprend le véritable pouvoir de l'amitié...

programme.title: Fandango
programme.desc: A 12 ans, Claire se prend d'affection pour un pur-sang, nommé Fandango. La jeune fille découvre alors que l'animal est traumatisé par l'accident de son cavalier, l'ancien champion Cal Masterson. Avec l'aide de Cal, elle fera tout pour aider son cheval à surmonter ses peurs.

programme.title: Une Mère Diabolique
programme.desc: Lorsque Allison, 14 ans, perd son père dans un accident d'avion, trois ans après la mort de sa mère adoptive, elle est dévastée. Lors des funérailles, elle est choquée de rencontrer sa mère biologique, Jessica. Elle et sa demi-sœur Sydni seront encore plus choquées de découvrir que Jessica a un plan infâme pour contrôler les 40 millions de dollars dont Allison doit hériter.

programme.title: Un Anglais à New York
programme.desc: Sidney Young est un intellectuel désabusé qui adore autant qu’il méprise le monde des célébrités, de la gloire et du glamour. Son magazine alternatif, Post Modern Review , se moque des stars obsédées par les médias et va à contre-courant des tendances. Lorsqu’on lui propose un poste dans le très conservateur magazine new-yorkais Sharps , c’est un véritable choc ! Il semble que Clayton Harding, le rédacteur en chef de Sharps , ait été amusé par la perturbation d’une soirée post-BAFTA par Young, accompagné d’un cochon déguisé en Babe. Commence alors la descente de Sidney vers le succès : il passe progressivement du statut d’outsider moqué à celui de confident de la starlette Sophie Maes. Au début, il est aidé chez Sharps par sa collègue Alison Olsen, qui cache elle aussi un secret. Leur amitié y survivra-t-elle ?

programme.title: La messagère
programme.desc: Après avoir frôlé la mort, Ellie Daly est terrifiée de réaliser qu'elle est capable de voir et de parler avec les morts. De retour chez elle, elle est abordée par le fantôme furieux d'une femme morte, qui accuse le mystérieux et séduisant nouveau voisin d'Ellie de son propre meurtre brutal.

programme.title: Le Signal
programme.desc: Lors d'un road trip, Nic et deux amis sont attirés dans une région isolée par un génie de l'informatique. Quand tout devient soudainement noir, Nic reprend conscience, pour se retrouver dans un cauchemar éveillé.

programme.title: Euronews Français
programme.desc: Euronews est la première chaine d’information internationale en Europe. Sa mission est de permettre à chacun de se forger sa propre opinion. Euronews est reconnue pour sa crédibilité et son indépendance.

programme.title: Euronews Italiano
programme.desc: Euronews è l'unico canale internazionale con una prospettiva davvero europea. La nostra missione è quella di permettere a ciascuno di farsi una propria opinione presentando, con imparzialità, tutti i diversi punti di vista.
